Flying
When this creature enters, return a permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Glint Hawk
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you return an artifact you control to its owner's hand.
card.flavor_text: Its eyes burned nearly blind by the Whitesun, it hunts by metallic gleam.

card.name: Seeker of the Way
card.oracle_text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gains lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "I don't know where my destiny lies, but I know it isn't here."

card.oracle_text:
Destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
Draw a card.

{T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Cryogen Relic
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, draw a card.
{1}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a stun counter on up to one target tapped creature. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
card.flavor_text: Older than the Eumidian seedships that populated Evendo.

card.name: Metallic Rebuke
card.oracle_text:
Improvise (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)
Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
card.flavor_text:
"Too little, too late. The machine is in motion."
—Tezzeret

card.name: Journey to Nowhere
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, exile target creature.
When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Thraben Charm
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Thraben Charm deals damage equal to twice the number of creatures you control to target creature.
• Destroy target enchantment.
• Exile any number of target players' graveyards.

card.name: Lightning Bolt
card.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Makeshift Munitions
card.oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: This enchantment deals 1 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: "Grease up a firecannon good and proper with dinosaur-liver oil, and it'll shoot just about anything."

card.name: Mortuary Mire
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you may put target creature card from your graveyard on top of your library.
{T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Torch the Tower
card.oracle_text:
Bargain (You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.)
Torch the Tower deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell was bargained, instead it deals 3 damage to that permanent and you scry 1.
If a permanent dealt damage by Torch the Tower would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Experimental Synthesizer
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card.
{2}{R}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 2/2 white Samurai creature token with vigilance. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Campfire
card.oracle_text:
{1}, {T}: You gain 2 life.
{2}, {T}, Exile this artifact: Put all commanders you own from the command zone and from your graveyard into your hand. Then shuffle your graveyard into your library.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Lembas
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, scry 1, then draw a card.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.
When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, its owner shuffles it into their library.
card.flavor_text: They could eat of it and find new strength even as they ran.

card.name: Dispel
card.oracle_text: Counter target instant spell.

—Jace Beleren

card.name: Thraben Inspector

card.flavor_text: "If you've been at this as long as I have, nothing can surprise you. That's the hope, at least."
